name: tsundoku
description: Tsundoku 積読 — your owned-but-unread e-book pile, turned into actionable knowledge. Search a Kobo library by title / author / series / publication date / category / description text / reading status / language, download chosen books as DRM-free EPUBs via subdavis/kobo-book-downloader, and convert downloaded EPUBs into chunked-by-chapter Markdown for LLM ingestion (book → skill workflow). Optional Calibre PDF conversion. macOS / Linux.
